raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/2023, XXXX tickets ( XXXX adult and XXXX child ) were intended to be purchased for XXXX XXXX Experience Show in XXXX XXXX via XXXX XXXX  with CiTI bank master Card on the app called XXXX. The tickets were purchased while waiting in the line. Instead of XXXX tickets, XXXX tickets got charged ( XXXX adult tickets and XXXX child ticket ). The card got charged {$150.00} total ( XXXX x {$40.00} each adult tickets, and {$35.00} for a child ticket ). 

During the check in, the person who scans the ticket was notified about the issue, they suggested to contact XXXX. While only XXXX adult ticket and XXXX child ticket got scanned for the entry, XXXX  was notified right away to issue the refund for XXXX unused adult tickets. The issue was notified within XXXX minutes of the purchase. XXXX  got back to us the day later indicating that they are not going to refund us money for XXXX adult tickets ( {$40.00} x XXXX ) and instead proposed to issue a voucher for future use. 

I declined to get the voucher and contacted CITI bank to dispute charges on XXXX tickets that got accidentally charged. CITI BANK issued a conditional refund. Ultimately, CITI bank reversed the refund as they went off of what XXXX had to say. CITI BANK never inquired anytime to collect my proofs or evidence to prove fever that XXXX tickets were never used or was charged in error. They never did a thorough scrutiny.
